name: code-memory
description: Local marketplace exposing the code-memory Claude Code plugin from this repo so `claude plugin install` can register its hooks.

plugins.name: code-memory
plugins.description: Auto-injects a code-memory Context Pack on each user prompt, re-indexes files after Write/Edit, runs a debounced cross-file resolver, records sessions as episodes, and detects durable user assertions to nudge codememory_assert_claim.
